Table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER

Card of table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER

Name

MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER

Code

MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER

---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data:

DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_INTERACTION_VOUCHER

 

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

SELECT

v.country_refcode AS COUNTRY_CODE,

v.identity_unique_identifier AS IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK,

v.interaction_id AS INTERACTION_IDENTIFIER_BK,

v.vouchers_voucher_amount AS VOUCHER_AMOUNT,

v.vouchers_voucher_id AS VOUCHER_IDENTIFIER_BK,

v.vouchers_voucher_name AS VOUCHER_NAME,

TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(v.date_time) AS INTERACTION_DATETIME,

CASE

WHEN INTERACTION_DATETIME IS NOT NULL

AND (v.dup_cnt = 1 OR v.rn_by_load_ts = 1)

THEN INTERACTION_DATETIME

ELSE v.__load_ts

END AS VALID_FROM

-- [VALID_TO]

-- [ACTIVE_FLAG]

FROM (

SELECT

v.*,

COUNT(*) OVER (

PARTITION BY v.identity_unique_identifier, v.interaction_id, v.vouchers_voucher_id, v.date_time

) AS dup_cnt,

ROW_NUMBER() OVER (

PARTITION BY v.identity_unique_identifier, v.interaction_id, v.vouchers_voucher_id, v.date_time

ORDER BY v.__load_ts ASC

) AS rn_by_load_ts

FROM DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_INTERACTION_VOUCHER v WHERE TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(v.date_time) <= v.__LOAD_TS OR TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(v.date_time) IS NULL

) v;

 

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: identity_unique_identifier, interaction_id, vouchers_voucher_id

Primary key(s) Target: IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK, INTERACTION_IDENTIFIER_BK, VOUCHER_IDENTIFIER_BK

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

PII data

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level.

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD2

 

----------

RLS

----------

--RLS v2 add join to MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER to sharing script

 

SELECT v.*

FROM T_DCE2_INTERACTION_VOUCHER v

LEFT JOIN MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER c

ON c.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK = v.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK

AND v.VALID_FROM >= c.VALID_FROM

AND v.VALID_FROM < c.VALID_TO

WHERE

c.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES)

OR v.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES);

 

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

Target schema: PL_INTERACTION


Check constraint name of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER

CKT_MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_V


Server validation rule of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER

%RULES%


Code preview of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER

drop table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER
--==============================================================
create or replace table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER (
IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK TEXT not null,
INTERACTION_IDENTIFIER_BK TEXT not null,
VOUCHER_IDENTIFIER_BK TEXT not null,
COUNTRY_CODE TEXT,
VOUCHER_NAME TEXT,
VOUCHER_AMOUNT DECIMAL(38,5),
INTERACTION_DATETIME DATE,
VALID_FROM DATE not null,
VALID_TO DATE not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG BOOLEAN not null,
constraint PK_MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VO primary key (IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK, INTERACTION_IDENTIFIER_BK, VOUCHER_IDENTIFIER_BK)
not enforced
);

alter table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER set comment = 'The Interaction Voucher table captures information about vouchers used by consumers during checkout or other service-related activities. It records voucher identifiers and associated details for each interaction, enabling visibility into how vouchers influenced the transaction, including any price reductions applied to the consumer’s purchase. This dataset supports the analysis of voucher utilization, promotional effectiveness, and consumer behavior related to discounts and incentive programs.';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK is
'Unique original identifier of the user (identity_unique_identifier)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER.INTERACTION_IDENTIFIER_BK is
'Unique ID of the interaction. Reference data: Action_ID (interaction_id)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER.VOUCHER_IDENTIFIER_BK is
'Identifier of the voucher if used during the interaction (vouchers_voucher_id)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER.COUNTRY_CODE is
'2 letters ISO country code; Reference Data: Country (country_refcode)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER.VOUCHER_NAME is
'Name of the voucher related with the interaction. If any voucher was used: Null (vouchers_voucher_name)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER.VOUCHER_AMOUNT is
'Amount of the voucher used in the interaction (vouchers_voucher_amount)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER.INTERACTION_DATETIME is
'Timestamp of the interaction date (date_time)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is Active ';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER.VALID_TO is
'It indicates till when the record is Active ';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER.ACTIVE_FLAG is
'It indicates if the record is active ';

Column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER

Card of the column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER

Name

VALID_FROM

Code

VALID_FROM

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER

VALID_FROM: Indicates when record validity begins, based on the business timestamp (DATE_TIME). If duplicates exist, the technical load timestamp (__load_ts) is used to resolve them.

Column VALID_TO of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER

Card of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER

VALID_TO: Indicates the datetime till when the record was valid based on the business timestamp (DATE_TIME). If duplicates exist, the technical load timestamp (__load_ts) is used to resolve them. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31


Check constraint name of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_VOUCHER
